title: Department Manager Vacancy at Crossword Bookstores - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Crossword Bookstores - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Crossword Bookstores is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Tiruchirappalli. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Crossword Bookstores:
Crossword Bookstores is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crossword Bookstores!
